title: manilkara pleeana
intro: Manilkara pleeana, also known as the Malabar plum or the Java plum, is a tropical evergreen tree native to the tropical regions of Asia and the Pacific Islands. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help treat various health issues such as fever, diarrhea, and skin infections. The health benefits of Manilkara pleeana include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and provide antioxidant properties that can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant's fruits, leaves, and bark are used to make teas, extracts, and infusions that can be used to treat various health conditions, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine.
